Import PyTorch and the ViT module from vit.py
Define a batch size of 16 and image dimensions of 224x224
Create random uniform input data with shape (batch_size, height, width, channels)
Initialize ViT model with parameters dim=128, seq_len=49+1, depth=12, heads=8, k=64
Set learning rate to 0.001 and use Adam optimizer
Define loss function as Cross-Entropy Loss
Prepare a dummy dataset with labels for the input images
Train the model for 5 epochs on the dummy dataset
Monitor the accuracy rate during training
Assert that in epoch 1, the accuracy rate is exactly 1.0000
Verify that there are no NaN values in loss calculation
Check if the model parameters remain unchanged throughout the training process
Collect and assert the final validation accuracy rate to be 1.0000
